status: POST-FREEZE EXPLORATORY (review-response, 2026-07-21); zero API calls; plan item ICLR_REVISION_PLAN.md §P0-2
convention: frozen bench arms; pre-cutoff 240-date universe; gap/fake_map/loaders reused from analyze_fm1 / analyze_bench_row; bootstrap B=10k, fresh default_rng(2026) per (model, CI variant), E2 draws then E3 draws on one stream (frozen discipline)

balanced_n11.rule: crisis dates chronological; each claims nearest (abs days, tie -> earlier) unused calm date; seed-free
